heading: Remedies as cumulative
label: 15103 Remedies as cumulative
text: Except as otherwise provided in this part, the remedies provided under this part are in addition to remedies existing under another law or common law.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10103 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10103 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
